overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a gothic great hall with floating candles illuminating long dining tables filled with students. The scene features high vaulted stone ceilings, stained glass windows, and warm atmospheric lighting typical of a magical school dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

agents.ego_description: standing still at the rear of the great hall, observing the dining students and the magical floating candles overhead

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure floating near the right wall, slightly bobbing up and down

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall showing blue and purple hues
long wooden house tables lined with students and lit by candlelight
long wooden house tables lined with students on the right side of the aisle
tall gothic stone walls with arched windows and medieval architecture
tall gothic stone walls with torches and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Long wooden tables fill the space with students seated for a meal, while a translucent ghostly figure hovers near the right wall. The warm candlelight contrasts with the cool blue light filtering through the large stained glass window at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand gothic dining hall where warm candlelight blends with cool atmospheric tones. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, focusing on the hundreds of floating candles that cast a golden glow over long wooden tables filled with students. As the camera lingers, the view encompasses a translucent ghostly figure hovering near the right wall, adding a supernatural element to the scene. The perspective then draws the eye toward the far end of the hall, where the warm interior light shifts into the deep blue hues filtering through a large stained glass window.
